query: SELECT a.id, cv.title, cv.uploadDate, LEFT(a.analysisResult, 500) as result_preview FROM analyses a JOIN channelVideos cv ON cv.analysisId = a.id WHERE cv.uploadDate >= '2026-03-09' ORDER BY cv.uploadDate DESC LIMIT 5;
